name: labelman-clip
description: Classify images against candidate terms using a CLIP HTTP endpoint. Returns per-image, per-term confidence scores.

inputs.name: CLIP endpoint URL
inputs.description: HTTP endpoint that accepts images and candidate terms, returns similarity scores.

inputs.name: Candidate terms
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of candidate term strings to score against each image.

inputs.name: Image file paths
inputs.description: One or more image file paths to classify.
